catalogs.description: A fictional catalog of everyday planning, organization, and personal productivity skills.

skills.name: daily-agenda-builder
skills.description: Builds a practical daily agenda from tasks, deadlines, appointments, and available time.

skills.name: inbox-action-sorter
skills.description: Sorts a message inbox into clear action, waiting, reference, and archive buckets.

skills.name: meeting-context-brief
skills.description: Prepares a concise meeting brief with objectives, context, participants, and discussion questions.

skills.name: note-collection-organizer
skills.description: Restructures scattered notes into labeled topics, decisions, actions, and references.

skills.name: habit-routine-designer
skills.description: Designs a lightweight routine and tracking cadence for a behavior the user wants to repeat.

skills.name: trip-preparation-checklist
skills.description: Creates a destination-aware preparation and packing checklist for a planned trip.

skills.name: weekly-meal-outline
skills.description: Outlines practical meals for a week from dietary preferences, time limits, and available ingredients.

skills.name: spending-snapshot-maker
skills.description: Turns a simple list of income and expenses into a categorized spending snapshot.

skills.name: focus-session-coach
skills.description: Shapes a bounded focus session with one outcome, a work interval, breaks, and distraction controls.

skills.name: document-keypoint-digest
skills.description: Condenses supplied prose into key points, decisions, caveats, and next actions.

cases.prompt: I have five errands, a 2 p.m. appointment, and three hours of desk work. Turn them into a realistic plan for today.
메일이 너무 쌓였어. 오늘 답장할 것, 기다릴 것, 참고만 할 것으로 나눠 줘.
Brief me for tomorrow's partner call: what we are trying to decide, what context matters, and what I should ask.
흩어진 회의 메모를 주제, 결정 사항, 할 일, 참고 자료로 다시 정리해 줘.
매일 저녁 10분 reading을 꾸준히 하도록 cue, 체크 방식, missed day 복귀 규칙을 만들어 줘.
Make a packing and before-you-leave checklist for a four-day winter city break with one formal dinner.
평일에는 20분 안에 만들 수 있고 재료를 남기지 않는 5일 저녁 식단을 짜 줘.
Group these purchases into categories and show where most of my monthly allowance went.
보고서 초안을 끝내기 위한 50분 집중 세션을 설계해 줘. 알림 차단과 쉬는 시간도 포함해.
Condense the policy memo I pasted into key points, explicit caveats, decisions, and follow-up actions.
내일 오전 할 일을 time-block하고, 가장 중요한 글쓰기 작업에는 방해 없는 focus sprint도 잡아 줘.
After the workshop, sort my raw notes by topic and give me a short digest of the conclusions and caveats.
Solve the equation x squared minus 7x plus 10 equals zero and show the factorization.
자전거 앞 브레이크가 끼익거리는데 캘리퍼를 어떻게 정비해야 해?
Translate this short Japanese greeting into natural Spanish.
사진 속 새의 종을 깃털 무늬와 부리 모양으로 식별해 줘.

catalogs.description: A fictional software-development catalog whose neighboring skills intentionally overlap around diagnosis, change planning, review, and release readiness.

skills.name: failure-trace-investigator
skills.description: Structures evidence gathering and hypothesis testing for reproducible software failures.

skills.name: behavior-test-designer
skills.description: Designs deterministic tests around expected behavior, edge cases, and regressions.

skills.name: interface-contract-auditor
skills.description: Reviews changes to service or library interfaces for compatibility and consumer impact.

skills.name: schema-change-safety-planner
skills.description: Plans staged database schema changes with rollback, compatibility, and data-safety considerations.

skills.name: runtime-bottleneck-profiler
skills.description: Plans measurement-led investigation of latency, throughput, CPU, memory, or I/O bottlenecks.

skills.name: dependency-transition-planner
skills.description: Plans dependency upgrades by identifying compatibility risks, migration work, and validation steps.

skills.name: code-boundary-refactorer
skills.description: Plans focused refactors that improve code ownership and separation without changing public behavior.

skills.name: release-evidence-checker
skills.description: Builds a release-readiness check from test evidence, change scope, rollout needs, and known risks.

skills.name: trust-boundary-reviewer
skills.description: Reviews a software change for input, authorization, data exposure, and trust-boundary risks.

skills.name: change-documentation-aligner
skills.description: Finds user and developer documentation that must be updated to match a software change.

cases.prompt: An intermittent worker crash only appears after retries. Help me form hypotheses and design the smallest reproduction sequence.
이 버그가 다시 생기지 않도록 정상 경로, 경계값, 실패 경로를 포함한 회귀 테스트를 설계해 줘.
Review this proposed response payload rename and tell me which clients would break and what compatibility path we have.
운영 테이블에 NOT NULL 열을 추가해야 해. 구버전 앱과 함께 동작하는 단계적 migration과 rollback을 짜 줘.
The search endpoint became twice as slow. Propose measurements that distinguish database, network, CPU, and serialization costs.
프레임워크 메이저 버전을 올릴 때 호환성 위험, 전환 순서, 검증 항목을 정리해 줘.
This service class handles validation, persistence, and notifications. Plan a behavior-preserving split into clearer boundaries.
배포 전에 테스트 증거, rollout 조건, 알려진 위험을 한 번에 확인하는 ship checklist가 필요해.
Review the new file-sharing endpoint for authorization gaps, untrusted input, and accidental data exposure.
CLI 옵션 이름을 바꿨는데 README, 예제, 도움말에서 어디를 고쳐야 할지 찾아 업데이트 목록을 만들어 줘.
We are replacing a customer ID field in the public API and its backing column. Review consumer compatibility and stage the database migration safely.
라이브러리 upgrade 뒤 메모리 사용량이 급증했어. 전환 위험을 점검하고 before/after profiling 계획도 세워 줘.
Write three playful taglines for a neighborhood bakery's summer poster.
주말에 베란다에서 키우기 좋은 허브 세 가지와 물 주는 주기를 알려 줘.
Explain how compound interest works using a simple savings example.
이 코드와 무관하게 봄비를 주제로 짧은 하이쿠를 써 줘.
